fields.name: Service Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the Service Price Adjustment Group that was assigned to the service item linked to this service line.

fields.name: Fault Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the fault area assigned to the given service price group.

fields.name: Cust. Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the customer price group associated with the given service price group.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code assigned to the service price group.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the service hours become applicable to the service price group.

fields.name: Serv. Price Adjmt. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service price adjustment group that applies to the posted service line.

fields.name: Include Discounts
fields.tooltip: Specifies that any sales line or invoice discount set up for the customer will be deducted from the price of the item assigned to the service price group.

fields.name: Adjustment Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the adjustment type for the service item line.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount to which the price on the service price group is going to be adjusted.

fields.name: Include VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the amount to be adjusted for the given service price group should include VAT.
